review_title: Positive Experience with Keka
description: My overall experience using Keka has been quite positive. It is very easy for managing HR tasks like payroll and leave requests simple. The dashboard is very easy to navigate, which helps keep everything organized. It saves time and processes for both employees and managers.
author: Abhishek M.
pros: Very Easy to use for managing the tasks like payroll and attendance. Also Simplifies processes and saves a lot useful for both employees and managers.
cons: Nothing much, Using keka in Mobile app could need some improvements for smoother navigation use

review_title: Keka is the good solution for your business. It can automate your Human Resources unit easily.
description: One of the best automation HR/Payroll systems available and it is being using across the world.
author: Mohammad A.
pros: Great with the 1:1 meeting process as rare applications work with remote employees, The analytics are great with all the available diagrams.
cons: Still there is a gap with integration with other software and data.

review_title: Does the bare minimum; inflexible and customer service is poor
description: Overall experience is average. If you are looking for a basic HR automation software, it is ok but if you have any processes that need a little flexibility within the software or some tweaks from the normal, you are out of luck. Change is painfully slow and customer service is abysmal.
author: Puneet S.
pros: Basic HR automation features are all included
cons: Lot of the functionality is hard wired; impossible to make any changes. You have to wire your process to fit Keka. Customer Service is very poor. Most times, they dont understand the issue and ask to re-do activity. For example; some issue with Timesheet module; their solution, ask employees to re-submit all Timesheets for last 2 week.

review_title: Cost effective Hr& Payroll Management tool
description: Good tool for Mid and Start-up level companies, as it has many payroll management features.But large companies not suggetsed
author: Bhushan T.
pros: Remote Log in & Log out time management systemEasy to use mobile app
cons: Leaves and vacations *parts are little confusing

review_title: Nice and also good
author: Suraj C.
cons: We have sent multiple request to their project implementation team and support team and no response. When ever they are free they will call us and request to attend the meeting in short notice, the project team will never adjust and come to meeting based on the customer request.“
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: My Opinion ABout Keka
description: Keka HR handles finances, requests leaves of absence, plans holidays, requests financial records, tracks time and attendance, and calculates taxes at my place of employment. It gives a clear view of the wage split and the tax calculation so that the employees may feel secure in their pay. The pay stubs are constantly available, so getting access to your wage information is not too difficult. It is very helpful when several workers work from home to keep the business on schedule and positive to monitor the success of specific people, projects, or the entire team.
author: Mridul G.
pros: Keka offers a variety of solutions, from processing taxes to automating attendance. Employees may easily keep track of their time with this program's time tracking and attendance register. The process is further streamlined by the inclusion of an electronic leave application option. One particular aspect of Keka that I enjoy is the employee dashboard, where we can examine our coworkers' profiles, likes and dislikes, interest areas, and—most importantly—birthdays. Keka also gives us the ability to publish material, share announcements, or run polls from within the platform. As a consequence, HR will post a message whenever there is noteworthy news to let everyone in the company know. The mobile app is available and could help you keep it handy despite its slight sluggishness.
cons: Although flows exist, Keka HR is an excellent platform for managing everything in a business. Because the tool has so many functionality, an enhanced user interface is required in order to make each feature easier to understand. When their servers periodically go to sleep, their response times are terrible. Keka lacks a file management system, therefore when necessary, no files may be uploaded, making it difficult for teams to collaborate by exchanging documents internally. The mobile app has a number of faults as well, and sometimes even the punch-out feature does not work.

review_title: Best tool a management can have for their employees
description: With keka, my life got easier, I no longer need to remember to leave balance, no longer needed to ask HR for payslips (Thanks to auto generated payslips by keka). I get updates of latest polls being conducted in the company easily. I can recommend this product to make Monday mornings of employee cheerful on work.
author: Binny B.
pros: I just love this software like anything, It is filled with a number of features that are essential for day to day life. One simple feature that I love in Keka is employee dashboard where we can see our colleague's profile, their likes and dislikes, interest area and most importantly when you login in the portal, you see the birthdays of people. Its much more easier that Facebook to remember birthday's on our behalf. Generally we do not tend to remember our colleague's birthday. but with keka we get notification of all upcoming birthdays of the week. Few more thing that I love about keka are its features like expense management , leave tracking, leave application and leave balance etc. Also, you can upload some necessary documents in your portal which are only visible to the top management and they can use it for official purpose with your consent. It made my life easier because I no longer need to email my document to HR team every now and then.
cons: There are no such cons from my usage so far. Only thing is that if I forget to stop my time tracking by mistake, then I cannot off it by my mobile phone app. Rest everything is simply awesome.

review_title: A good solution for small and medium businesses.
description: The Keka app is an excellent software for payroll management. It has many features and can be customized according to the needs of our business. Its simple user interface makes it easy for us to use. Although we have only been trying the software, we can see how it can benefit our business by making payroll management work like a breeze.
author: Lawrent M.
pros: KEKA is easy to use, user-friendly, and straightforward to operate. It's an intuitive app that won't take you long to learn how it works. The interface is clean and uncluttered. It also has a simple layout, with tabs across the top of the screen allowing you to navigate between your different tools: one for creating a new Keke and another for editing existing ones.Customization is good; it allows you to meet your company's and its users' needs. In this case, KEKA provides software we can customize to fit our current needs. We like the excellent payroll management system. The software helps us ensure that all our employees are paid on time and can also help calculate the total amount of taxes those employees have to pay.KEKA is an excellent time tracking system because it allows you to keep track of how much time each employee spends working on different tasks throughout their work days, which makes it easier for employers who want this information so they can bill our clients appropriately.
cons: KEKA also has no integrations with the Basecamp or JIRA project management apps we want to use. The app only tracks time, so if we want to track other metrics like sales data or expenses, we need another tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Keka is the Best Way to Establish a Successful Business
description: Keka is the best way to make your company amazing. It automates human procedures and creates a motivated culture. The straightforward UI and easy-to-use features make data-driven decisions easier, and the potential to decrease boring activities is invaluable. I really recommend Keka for building a wonderful company.
author: Manisha K.
pros: Keka has transformed my HR management. Keka handles hiring, performance management, and data analytics for my company's people procedures. Keka lets me automate routine work and focus on strategy. The simple design and features make data-driven decisions easier. Keka's strongest strength is its culture of engagement and drive.
cons: I have not come across any significant issues with Keka so far. However, the only downside is that it might take some time to get used to the platform's features and functionalities. But once you get the hang of it, Keka is a breeze to use.

review_title: Perfect Payroll Management Tool
description: Keka helps in managing the payroll, finance and many more this from leave request to review cycles, from performance monitoring to upraises.
author: Mahek V.
pros: The Payroll & Finance Management is the best feature that Keka offers. The Remote logging and attendance tracking is done in a more accurate manner. The leave approval and request feature is very easy and seamless to mange and use. The daily digest notifications are the beauty of the software.
cons: There is nothing to dislike about this software it gives all set of features and functionality handy and that could even be customised.

review_title: Keka review
description: Reliable and user friendly interface which helps in better visibility over employee details
author: Hariharan V.
pros: It was a user friendly interface and the biggest advantage was that I could view my attendance and payroll directly from keka
cons: Nothing much, as a user myself I am satisfied with the overall experience that I have gotten

review_title: Good product, but no support.
description: The product is good, but with wrong set of people. We have purchase the product in the monthly of july and paid the product cost in full. The product is implementation is not completed even after 2 and half months and our staffs are not able to use the mobile app. We have sent multiple request to their project implementation team and support team and no response. When ever they are free they will call us and request to attend the meeting in short notice, the project team will never adjust and come to meeting based on the customer request.
author: Ashok R.
pros: The product is having good features and mobile app is also good. If they enable the face recognition the application will have add advantage features.
cons: The Product is having lot of options but no user manual provided for the customer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best HR Management Tool for Employees and Management
description: Overall experience with Keka is satisfying because it offers too much to get the job done. Keka is helpful for both employees and employers/HRs. It records everything to maintain a smooth work system within the organization.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Keka offers a lot of features to automate the entire process from requirement to joining. It has customized templates to send mail to employees, it has time tracking and attendance registry within the software which makes it easy for the employee to track time. it has an option to apply leave electronically which makes the process even smoother.
cons: Keka has some features missing such as workflow management system and files management system. It does not offer workflow management system to work collaboratively with the team by sharing documents internally because that feature is not available too.

review_title: Good App for HR And Application Tracking System
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Provide all the feature in low cost and the support team response is very good
cons: Customization Limitations, some time the all the excel format not taken

review_title: Keka - all your needs under one platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: An Intuitive and easy user interface is the first pro of Keka. I have used other hr platforms and Keka has been the easiest to use. Leave applying and attendance tracking could be easily done and managed. Also, showing whether a colleague is in or out the office is another amazing feature.
cons: There should be an option to modify/delete your leave requests. Also, there has been issue with Tax calculation too often. Otherwise, keka has been so far a good platform, and no particular dislikes from me.

review_title: Appraisals became easy
description: It is overall a very good experience and I find it very user friendly.
author: Mohit S.
pros: It has definitely helped in improving the appraisal process. The process is swift and easy to complete.
cons: When using from mobile, it asks for a lot of confirmation. It should give an option to select a location for a longer period of time and not asking for location confirmation with every login.

review_title: Good and cheap HRMS
author: Pranav J.
pros: Keka has all the features that a good HRMS must have. The interface is good. Leave management is awesome. The tax and payroll module is also nice and integration with clear tax is great.
cons: The interface can be made faster and more consistent. Integrations can be added with other third parties like slack.

review_title: Human Resource Management
author: Rishabh M.
pros: Tracking on Keka is super easy , so as the interface of the application , also marking absebse or leaves are easy as well.
cons: glitches , recently i have faced a issue where i am not able to log in due to software glitch although that has been resolved later on but still thAT issue should not come
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best archiver/unarchiver for Mac!
description: We depend on Keka nearly every day. Our cloud storage at box.com is limited to files under 5gb. Because we often have InDesign source files larger than this, we have to split the archives in order to store them in the cloud. Keka makes this super easy and is very reliable with great 7zip compression among other multi-part file splitting formats.
author: Michael W.
pros: Keka is fantastic. We depend on it almost every day. Oh, and also, their isopod logo/icon is pretty great too.
cons: The single most important improvement that Keka needs is the ability to *create* RAR files. It extracts them perfectly fine, but I understand that due to licensing issues they are unable to implement RAR creation into the software. There was an ancient beta version that did this which you can search out, but the RAR files it creates are unreliable. That's the only negative I can find about the great little piece of software.

review_title: Its very Easy to Use and Low cost
author: Raushan K.
pros: I Manage my data easily and very attractive dashboard
cons: I am using Keka since to more then 1 year i have good experience its very useful product, I can reduce my time that's why i Use Keka

review_title: The all-in-one organization solution
description: Perfect, modern, all-in-one solution for companies from looking for new employees to payroll them and see analysis. I will recommend this product to everyone who want to have everything in one place.
author: Martin P.
pros: This app literally resolve the most of your problems when you start your first startup. Your can create your organization and add all of your employees. Then you can use module for automatic payroll which is perfectly intuitive. Finally you can see overview of your spends and advanced analysis for every module.
cons: The pricing of this app a bit higher, for very small companies it is impossible to pay this money every month. On the other hand the application contains all modules which user can't pay separately.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use with good GUI
description: I am used it for last 8 month and I am satisfied with deskotop vesrion.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Best GUI with almost functionality and feature. you can see all your details and generate token.
cons: Keke app are need update on regular basis, so that irritateing.

review_title: great software to manage all employees
author: Wasim A.
pros: Keka is saving our most of the time to manage all type of employees issue, best thing in keka is anonymous feedback form. It help us to improve the organization internal structure.
cons: Sometimes mostly in the morning it's clock-in button is not working.

review_title: Best tool for Attendance
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and handle and can regular attendance
cons: Attendance punching and employee dashborad and design
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Modern UI and ease of use are the USP of keka
author: Navneet S.
pros: In comparison to beehive it's very smooth and the navigation & UI makes it very easy to operate. The options title are accurate unlike beehive and it's very important so that no time is wasted in just searching the trivial things.
cons: Most of the functionality are sorted so there's nothing much to complain about.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
